tips: Enable strict: true in tsconfig for full type safety
Prefer interfaces over type aliases for object shapes that may extend
Use readonly arrays: readonly T[] instead of T[] for immutability
Use satisfies operator to check types without widening
Prefer type inference over explicit annotations when obvious
Use discriminated unions instead of optional fields for state machines
Use const assertions (as const) for literal types
Branded types prevent accidental string/ID mixing
Use satisfies + as const for typed object literals
Use the satisfies keyword to validate types without widening
Use 'as const' on arrays to infer literal tuple types
Template literal types enable string pattern matching at the type level
Use Extract and Exclude to filter union types
TypeScript 5.0 introduced const type parameters for inference
